title: Metal Detectors Mod
description: Metal Detectors Mod Adds Configurable Metal Detectors To Your Game, Its Config Allows You To Change The Block ID Of What The Metal Detectors Detects, As well As It Being Open Source, It Is Perfect For Pairing With Other Mods.
body: The purpose of this mod is to add metal detectors to minecraft, it is open source so you can modify recipes as well as what the detectors detect, it detects blocks directly below it in a straight line to the ground.
